compliant_image_prompt: A high-quality, photorealistic studio advertisement featuring a confident, smiling young Malaysian Chinese woman with natural, glowing skin. She is dressed in a modest, elegant pastel-colored blouse. Beside her, place the product: a sleek, professional skincare tube labeled 'Even-Tone Radiance Serum'. The background is a clean, soft-focus minimalist studio setting with warm, inviting lighting. Text overlays in a modern, clean font: 'Hello, Radiance! Even-out your skin tone, bestie!' and a prominent circular badge that says 'FLAT 38% OFF'. The overall aesthetic is premium, clean, and culturally respectful, avoiding any mention of intimate body parts or aggressive skin whitening claims.
changes_suggested: Changed the discount from 42% to 38% to avoid the inauspicious number 4 in Chinese culture.
Rebranded 'Intimate Lightening Serum' to 'Even-Tone Radiance Serum' to move away from sensitive 'lightening' terminology and focus on healthy skin.
Removed the explicit mention of 'Patchy Inner Thighs' and replaced it with 'Even-out your skin tone' to maintain modesty and professionalism.
Updated the model to a Malaysian Chinese woman to better resonate with the target demographic.
Integrated Manglish phrasing ('bestie') to create a friendly, local, and relatable brand voice.
Ensured the overall tone is focused on 'radiance' and 'even-tone' rather than fixing 'flaws', aligning with better advertising standards.
